comments.author: Alexander Terp
comments.body: From #139: concrete real-world ask for this - a bg modifier for detached spawns (bg $...cmd... returning a pid) to replace the "nohup ... >>log 2>&1 </dev/null &" incantation. The remind script needed exactly this for its launchd checker. Pairs with the new get_pid card in next.

creator: Alexander Terp
title: RAD-329: Spawn a separate background process which will do something
